name: Cleric C3: Turn Undead (Destroy + Frighten) + Spirit Guardians Zone vs Undead Horde
description: L5 Life Cleric tests Turn Undead Channel Divinity (CR 0.25 skeletons destroyed via Destroy Undead, CR 3 Grimwight Frightened) then Spirit Guardians (L3 concentration aura, 3d8 radiant on monster turn starts) over 4 rounds. Covers: CD resource spend, Destroy Undead threshold, Frightened condition, zone spell creation, zone damage tick, concentration tracking, Sacred Flame cantrip fallback.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: 2 uses per short rest at level 5. Used for Turn Undead and other divine effects.

features.name: Turn Undead
features.description: Channel Divinity: Each Undead within 30 ft must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be Frightened for 1 minute.

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: When an Undead of CR 1/2 or lower fails its Turn Undead saving throw, it is destroyed (at level 5).

monsters.comment: CR 0.25 skeleton — within 15ft Spirit Guardians aura. WIS mod -1 vs DC 15 → almost certain Turn Undead fail → Destroyed at L5 (threshold CR 0.5).
monsters.name: Skeleton Minion A

monsters.comment: CR 0.25 skeleton — within 15ft zone. Same WIS → Destroyed on Turn Undead fail.
monsters.name: Skeleton Minion B

monsters.comment: CR 0.25 skeleton — within 15ft zone. Same WIS → Destroyed on Turn Undead fail.
monsters.name: Skeleton Minion C

monsters.comment: CR 3 Grimwight — within 15ft zone. WIS mod +1 vs DC 15 → likely fails Turn Undead → Frightened (not destroyed: CR 3 > 0.5 threshold). Takes Spirit Guardians damage each turn.
monsters.name: Grimwight

actions.comment: === ROUND 1: Initiative + Turn Undead ===

input.text: I call upon divine light to smite the undead horde!

actions.comment: Mara rolls 20 — goes first before all monsters.

Queue server-side WIS saves for Turn Undead (4 monsters). Low values (2) ensure all fail. Skeletons WIS mod -1: 2+(-1)=1 vs DC 15 → fail → Destroyed (CR 0.25 ≤ 0.5 at L5). Grimwight WIS mod +1: 2+1=3 vs DC 15 → fail → Frightened (CR 3 > 0.5).
R1 ACTION: Turn Undead — Channel Divinity. Server resolves AoE WIS saves against all undead within 30ft. All fail (queued dice). 3 skeletons destroyed (Destroy Undead), Grimwight frightened.
Verify CD spent: channelDivinity:cleric 2 → 1. Class hydration auto-creates this pool at 2/2 for L5 cleric.
Skeleton Minion A (CR 0.25): failed save → Destroyed by Destroy Undead (CR ≤ 0.5 at L5). HP → 0.
Skeleton Minion B destroyed same way.
Skeleton Minion C destroyed same way.
Grimwight (CR 3): failed save → Frightened (not destroyed, CR > 0.5). Should have Frightened condition.
Queue Grimwight's R1 turn action — Frightened: can't willingly approach Mara. Just end turn.
Mara ends R1. Grimwight takes its turn (queued endTurn).
Wait for R2 Mara turn. Grimwight acted (endTurn) between rounds.
Mara survived monster round (only Grimwight remains, was Frightened and ended turn).
=== ROUND 2: Cast Spirit Guardians (L3 concentration zone spell, 15ft aura) ===
Verify concentration switches to Spirit Guardians.
Verify L3 slot consumed: 2 → 1.

Queue Grimwight R2 turn. At START of its turn, Spirit Guardians triggers (3d8 radiant, WIS DC 15 save for half). Grimwight is within 15ft (at y=20, Mara at y=15 → 5 ft). Let it attack as default behavior.
End Mara R2. Grimwight starts its turn → Spirit Guardians zone damage fires (3d8 radiant, WIS save). Then Grimwight attacks.
Wait for R3 Mara turn.
Verify Spirit Guardians zone damage applied to Grimwight. 3d8 radiant = 3–24 damage. Grimwight started at 100 HP — should be reduced (exact depends on WIS save and dice).
Verify Mara HP reasonable (Grimwight may have hit during R2).
=== ROUND 3: Sacred Flame (cantrip) — maintain Spirit Guardians concentration ===
Sacred Flame consumes no spell slot (cantrip). L1 slots unchanged from end of R2.
Concentration on Spirit Guardians must still be active after Sacred Flame (not concentration spell).
Queue Grimwight R3 turn — zone damage fires again at turn start.
Mara ends R3.
Wait for R4 Mara turn. Grimwight took another zone damage tick in R3.
=== ROUND 4: Final assertions — CD spent, slot spent, concentration active ===
Final: channelDivinity:cleric still at 1 (only used once in R1). Recharges on short rest.
Final: L3 slot still at 1 (Spirit Guardians cost 1 slot in R2).
Final: Spirit Guardians concentration still active (unless broken by sustained damage). Grimwight has taken at least 2 rounds of zone damage + Sacred Flame hits.
